title: carelia matricarioides
intro: Carelia matricarioides, also known as wild chamomile or German chamomile, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of apigenin and other flavonoids in its essential oil. The health benefits of Carelia matricarioides include relaxation, improved sleep, and relief from anxiety and menstrual cramps, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Carelia matricarioides can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote calmness and soothe digestive issues.
